status: stopped on first invalid arm before Opus judging

failure.reason: All four internal C3 commands succeeded, but the external supervisor rejected 6184 raw transcript bytes against a 4000-byte threshold even though Codex native tool_output_token_limit governed retained model context.

product_learning: Native tool_output_token_limit is the cost-relevant retained-context control. Raw JSONL transcript bytes are a transport diagnostic and should not invalidate an arm unless they cross the separate transport ceiling.
post_failure_rule: Do not rerun the exposed case. Any successor must use a fresh replacement case, retain the native 400-token per-tool cap, and register raw tool-result bytes only as a high transport breaker.
